description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building set on a sloped terrain with a distinctive angular base. The structure features a combination of flat and slightly pitched roof sections, with several rectangular volumes interlocking to form the main living spaces. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some darker accents and natural wood elements visible around the entry and patio areas. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The property is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, and there is a small driveway or parking area adjacent to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines and open outdoor spaces, characteristic of contemporary bungalow architecture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with angular lines, flat and pitched roofs, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The exterior features light gray, white, and wood accents, set on a sloped base.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated corner, highlighting the sloped base, main entrance, and landscaped trees at the rear.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side profile, emphasizing the angular terrain, flat roof sections, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and trees.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a top-down perspective, revealing the interlocking rectangular volumes, patio areas, and the asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, focusing on the driveway, additional landscaping, and the geometric roof forms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
